# Vendor API libraries

This directory is intentionally empty in the public source-code release.

To build and run the project, place the Thermo Fisher Scientific Exactive-series IAPI libraries here:

```text
API-1.0.dll
API-1.1.dll
ESAPI-1.0.dll
ESAPI-1.1.dll
```

Optional XML documentation files may also be added:

```text
API-1.0.xml
API-1.1.xml
ESAPI-1.0.xml
ESAPI-1.1.xml
```

These files must be obtained from Thermo Fisher Scientific or an authorized local installation under the appropriate IAPI software license agreement.
